name: Artmage Impasto -Recapture-
name_jp: アルトメギア・インパスト－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>奪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>還</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: If you control an "Artmage" monster, you can activate this card the turn it was Set. When your opponent activates a monster effect: Banish 1 Fusion Monster you control (until the End Phase), and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that card, then if you have 3 or more different Monster Types on your field, you can return all Spells/Traps your opponent controls to the hand. You can only activate 1 "Artmage Impasto -Recapture-" per turn.
eff: If you control an "Artmage" monster, you can activate this card the turn it was Set. When your opponent activates a monster effect: Banish 1 Fusion Monster you control (until the End Phase), and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that card, then if you have 3 or more different Monster Types on your field, you can return all Spells/Traps your opponent controls to the hand. You can only activate 1 "Artmage Impasto -Recapture-" per turn.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
mst: Can be activated the turn it was Set
Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
